name: FjordSense Passive Array
summary: Fixed passive acoustic array for under-ice monitoring where patrol coverage is thin
company_facing_context: Best suited for fixed underwater watch lines in ice-affected approaches

name: Northshore Ice Relay Buoy
summary: Autonomous relay buoy that keeps offshore Arctic sensors connected through ice season
company_facing_context: Best where offshore sensors need winter connectivity without staffed sites

name: Polar Mesh Edge Grid
summary: Edge fusion layer that merges radar acoustic and satellite feeds into one operating picture
company_facing_context: Best for teams stitching together multiple Arctic monitoring tools

name: Polar Mesh Bandwidth Governor
summary: Traffic orchestration software that protects mission-critical data on degraded northern links
company_facing_context: Useful only where link saturation is limiting remote operations

name: Aegir Scout AUV
summary: Autonomous underwater patrol vehicle built for under-ice ISR where surface access is limited
company_facing_context: Most relevant for missions that need subsea reach beyond crewed patrols

name: Aegir Ice Margin Mapper
summary: Mission payload that maps ice edge movement and subsea anomalies during AUV patrols
company_facing_context: Creates mission value only when paired with an operational AUV platform

name: IceThread Arctic Pattern Engine
summary: Anomaly detection software that flags suspicious vessel behavior across sparse Arctic feeds
company_facing_context: Best when teams need alerting instead of manual review across many data sources

name: Boreal Spectrum Shoreline Radar
summary: Coastal radar stack optimized for narrow Arctic approaches and ice-affected chokepoints
company_facing_context: Best suited for fixed watch sites covering high-value corridors

name: Boreal Spectrum Ice Drift Classifier
summary: Forecast model that converts radar tracks into near-term ice route risk decisions
company_facing_context: Most useful where operators already collect radar data but need route calls faster

name: Aurora Longline Relay
summary: Long-range relay node that backhauls remote coastal sensors across sparse northern corridors
company_facing_context: Best for corridor-scale sensing where permanent infrastructure is absent

name: Fjord Cloud SAR Change Lens
summary: SAR analytics layer that isolates persistent surface change across wide Arctic areas
company_facing_context: Best when overhead collections already exist but analysts need faster change review

name: Snowcap Trailblazer UGV
summary: Over-snow unmanned scout for route reconnaissance near austere Arctic outposts
company_facing_context: Useful for forward teams that need route checks without exposing crews

name: Snowcap Sensor Sled
summary: Towable sensor sled for short-duration route surveys and temporary watch coverage
company_facing_context: Best for temporary deployments rather than permanent Arctic monitoring

name: Drift Passive RF Net
summary: Passive RF sensing network for detecting emitters along remote maritime approaches
company_facing_context: Most useful when active sensing would reveal the watch position

name: Tundra Edge Mission Stack
summary: Disconnected mission software stack that keeps local awareness tools running without backhaul
company_facing_context: Strong fit as the local software backbone inside larger Arctic monitoring systems

name: Arctic Current Docking Pod
summary: Cold-weather docking pod that recharges unmanned maritime systems between patrols
company_facing_context: Most relevant after unmanned patrol concepts prove endurance in real conditions

name: Northwatch Ice Route Monitor
summary: Satellite service that tracks route risk vessel movement and ice change across Arctic corridors
company_facing_context: Best for teams responsible for wide-area route awareness rather than local site watch

name: Coldwater Horizon EO Mast
summary: Deployable EO IR mast for short-notice watch at austere northern sites
company_facing_context: Best for temporary Arctic sites that need local visual watch quickly

name: Polar Guardian Microgrid Kit
summary: Portable power kit that sustains relay and sensing nodes through low-sun Arctic deployments
company_facing_context: Best as an enabling layer for remote monitoring sites with weak sustainment

name: Inlet High North Mesh Radio
summary: Expeditionary mesh radio that creates local connectivity at temporary Arctic monitoring sites
company_facing_context: Best for fast stand-up of local sensor and operator networks

name: KATFISH Towed Synthetic Aperture Sonar
summary: Actively stabilized towed synthetic aperture sonar system for high-resolution underwater survey, seabed imaging, and subsea object detection.
company_facing_context: Best reviewed for underwater ISR, route survey, seabed change detection, and mine or subsea infrastructure awareness use cases.

name: MDA CHORUS Synthetic Aperture Radar Constellation
summary: Next-generation C-band and X-band synthetic aperture radar constellation intended to provide all-weather day-night Earth observation data.
company_facing_context: Best reviewed as an overhead sensing layer for Arctic awareness, maritime monitoring, and distributed sensor fusion.

name: Envoy Long-Endurance Autonomous Underwater Vehicle
summary: Long-endurance fuel-cell autonomous underwater vehicle designed for persistent subsea missions and extended underwater operation.
company_facing_context: Best reviewed for undersea route reconnaissance, subsea infrastructure monitoring, and extended underwater patrol validation.

name: IRIS Terminal Airspace Visualization
summary: Airspace visualization and situational awareness software that combines sensor, telemetry, and air traffic inputs for uncrewed operations.
company_facing_context: Best reviewed for uncrewed system deconfliction, BVLOS test ranges, and local mission visualization in complex operations.

name: TRAPS Towed Reelable Active Passive Sonar
summary: Compact active-passive variable-depth sonar system for underwater target detection, classification, tracking, and localization.
company_facing_context: Best reviewed for surface-ship and uncrewed-surface underwater surveillance roles in maritime approaches.

name: Autonomous USV Maritime Awareness Platform
summary: Autonomous uncrewed surface vessel platform for persistent maritime security, ocean data collection, and remote maritime awareness.
company_facing_context: Best reviewed as a persistent surface collection node that can complement overhead, acoustic, and mission software layers.
